hero.subtitle: Connect with the world's leading AI technologies, expert consultants, and a global business network

brandStory.title: AI Business Co-Creation
brandStory.p1: Basicware AI partners with world-class top AI large model (LLM) developers through commercial research and application, focusing on being an AI business co-creation partner for global clients and building a bridge between clients and business value with an enterprise community mindset.
brandStory.p2: We focus on AI technology implementation, abandon superficial technical concepts, integrate cutting-edge AI technologies into clients' entire business processes with the world's latest top AI technologies and agile iteration capabilities, solve pain points such as difficult technology landing, weak business transformation and blocked cross-border expansion, and move forward side by side with clients as partners.
brandStory.p3: The brand adheres to the core propositions of client success, global cutting-edge tech confidence, and global symbiosis. Embracing the world's latest cutting-edge AI technologies and facing the global market, we help enterprises break geographical and industry barriers, optimize business processes and explore growth space. In the future, we will continue to take AI as the bond to jointly build a business ecosystem and expand global markets with global clients, unlocking unlimited corporate potential.

cta.title: Ready to see more?
cta.subtitle: 100+ projects. 10+ countries. Results that speak for themselves.
cta.tagline: Based in Hong Kong · Working across Southeast Asia and beyond

partnership.title: Powered by the world's leading AI and cloud platforms
partnership.partnerTitle: Official Global Distributor of BytePlus, Regional Exclusive Distributor for major global cloud providers, and partner of the top 3 telecommunications companies in Hong Kong.
partnership.partnerBody1: In strategic cooperation with Volcano Engine (ByteDance), jointly promoting the commercialization of AI solutions and co-building the AI infrastructure ecosystem. Exclusive channel partner for the ByteDance + Pearson AI certification system in the Asia-Pacific region.
partnership.partnerBody2: We have established in-depth cooperation with industry leaders including Alibaba Cloud, HUAWEI Cloud, Tencent Cloud and Lark. We have obtained numerous authoritative certifications such as Alibaba Cloud Flagship Channel Partner and HUAWEI Authorized Distributor. We are also an official partner of BytePlus (ByteDance) and an authorized commercial service partner within the Lark ecosystem. These credentials lay a solid foundation of trust for our global business expansion.
partnership.partnerBody3: 3HK and Basicware AI have formed a strategic alliance, leading Hong Kong's telecommunications industry into a new era of AI Token. Via the BasicRouter platform, users can access over 60 mainstream global Large Language Models (LLMs) on demand and experience the tangible commercial value of collaborative AI multi-model operations. Featuring zero risk and no upfront payment, the platform enables simple, stable and secure access to global AI computing power.

cards.body: Deploy intelligent digital employees that don't just chat — they execute. OpenClaw enables one-click deployment of AI agents across customer support, sales, HR, finance, operations, and R&D — with 24/7 multi-channel integration.

cards.body: One API, every model. BasicRouter unifies access to 10+ global AI foundation models — Qwen, Doubao, DeepSeek, GPT, Gemini, Claude — with enterprise-grade security, real-time cost analytics, and flexible multi-cloud billing.

worldwide.titleDark: Delivering from a dozen operation and development centers.
worldwide.body: From strategic hubs in Hong Kong, Shenzhen, and Taiwan to regional offices across Southeast Asia.

solutionsPage.ctaTitleBefore: Let's find your fastest path to

solutions.title: Centralized Token Control
solutions.shortDesc: One gateway to the world's top AI models. Connect once, switch freely, scale without limits.
solutions.longDesc: It aggregates mainstream domestic and overseas large language models including GPT, Gemini, Doubao, Qwen, Claude and DeepSeek in one stop. As one of the first overseas enterprises licensed for Seedance 2.0, we deliver enterprise-grade security, real-time cost analytics and flexible multi-cloud billing solutions, significantly cutting enterprises' expenses on multi-model integration, procurement and operation & maintenance.
solutions.testimonialQuote: "Basicware's AI solutions transformed our business. Their team's expertise and cutting-edge technology helped us achieve unprecedented growth and efficiency."
bullets: One API, instant access to 10+ leading global AI models

Cost Reduction & Efficiency Boost: Gain access to all models with a single integration, eliminating cumbersome multi-platform connection procedures and slashing months of development work down to just a few days
Unified billing and real-time cost monitoring across your whole team
Enterprise-grade security — end-to-end encryption, tiered permissions, full audit trail
Direct supply from cloud providers — no data collected from your conversations

solutions.title: AI Digital Employees
solutions.shortDesc: Your teams spend too much time on tasks that don't need a human. OpenClaw deploys AI digital employees that operate around the clock.
solutions.longDesc: Built for enterprises, this large-scale AI collaborative system supports one-click deployment of AI work nodes and is compatible with various collaboration platforms including Lark, WhatsApp and WeChat. Equipped with enterprise-level permission control, API key management and cost monitoring functions, it can generate digital employees for multiple roles such as marketing, customer service, sales, R&D, operation & maintenance and knowledge management. It enables 24/7 automated office operations and improves organizational collaboration efficiency.
solutions.testimonialQuote: "OpenClaw's AI agents handled our customer support overnight. Response time dropped from hours to seconds, and satisfaction scores climbed 85%."
bullets: Brand Marketing — content scheduling, social media monitoring, campaign reporting
Customer Support — 24/7 multilingual responses, smart human handoff
Sales Assistant — lead follow-up, meeting scheduling, quote generation
HR — resume screening, onboarding, employee records
Finance — document verification, monthly closing, tax filing

solutions.title: AI Content & Growth
solutions.shortDesc: Marketing teams are under pressure to produce more — faster, in more formats, across more channels than ever.
solutions.longDesc: We maintain deep integration with ByteDance's Douyin, TikTok and VolcEngine. Powered by AIGC technology, we mass-produce marketing assets including copywriting, images, short videos and virtual live streamers. Intelligent data algorithms enable targeted ad placement, user insight analysis and private domain operations, helping brands, e-commerce merchants and cross-border businesses cut costs, boost efficiency and lift GMV.
solutions.testimonialQuote: "Our TikTok account went from 3,000 to 63,200 followers in a single month. 40x growth we couldn't have achieved without Basicware."
bullets: AI Copywriting — marketing copy, ad headlines, product descriptions, social posts
AI Image Generation — ad creatives and visual content, produced in hours not weeks
AI Video Production — automated editing, dynamic content generation
Digital Avatar Broadcast — virtual presenters with multi-language support
TikTok & Douyin Growth — end-to-end short-video strategy and performance optimization

solutions.title: AI Education
solutions.shortDesc: AI adoption fails when teams don't know how to use it. We help organizations close that gap.
solutions.longDesc: Build an AI talent cultivation system covering the Asia-Pacific region. We have launched an authoritative AI certification system in partnership with BytePlus (ByteDance) and Pearson. Cooperating with universities and local governments in Hong Kong, Macao and Southeast Asia, we provide online and offline training programs to build standardized pathways for AI talent development and continuously supply skilled professionals to the industry.
solutions.testimonialQuote: "The certification gave our team a competitive edge. Recognized across the region and valued by every enterprise client we approached."
bullets: Online courses — AI skill training accessible to teams across geographies
Offline courses & assessments — in-person instruction delivered through regional partnerships
AI Engineer Certification — co-certified by TikTok and Pearson, recognized by governments and enterprises across the region
Issued exclusively in joint cooperation with top-tier platforms and globally authoritative institutions, the certification carries high industry value

solutions.title: Multi-Cloud Computing Platform
solutions.shortDesc: Unify global multi-cloud resources to build an elastic, unified computing foundation, delivering stable and reliable computing power for full-scenario AI applications.
solutions.longDesc: We integrate resources from five major global cloud vendors including Alibaba Cloud, Tencent Cloud, AWS and Huawei Cloud to build a stable and elastic unified computing infrastructure, delivering highly reliable computing power to all types of AI applications.
bullets: Aggregate mainstream global cloud ecosystems with full resource coverage and flexible scheduling
Multi-cloud redundant architecture ensures stable operation and high availability
Unified operation and management drastically cut enterprises' costs on computing resource procurement and maintenance

results.label: audience growth for a hospitality brand
in new revenue for a gaming company

successStoriesDetail.challengeBody: The client was struggling to scale their digital presence in a competitive, multi-language market. Their content team was spending the majority of their time on low-impact production tasks, leaving little bandwidth for strategy. Existing tools were siloed, requiring manual handoffs between six different platforms and generating inconsistent brand output.
successStoriesDetail.solutionBody: Basicware deployed a unified AI content and distribution platform, tailored to the client's brand voice and market. Our proprietary model blend handled ideation, creation, and channel optimisation simultaneously — across 12 languages and 6 platforms — with a human-in-the-loop review layer that kept editorial quality high without slowing output.

results.title: 40× audience growth
results.body: Achieved in a single month through AI-optimised cross-channel publishing and real-time engagement scoring.

results.title: 63,200 new followers
results.body: Organic acquisition across all platforms, driven by algorithmically timed, language-localised content bursts.

results.title: 85% faster production
results.body: Content turnaround dropped from 4 days to under 8 hours, freeing the team to focus on brand strategy.

pressRelease3hk.officialLink: View on Hutchison Telecom Hong Kong (English)

story.title: Our story
story.p1: Basicware was founded on a simple observation: the AI landscape was moving fast, but most businesses were being left behind — not because they lacked ambition, but because they lacked a guide.
story.p2: We set out to change that. Headquartered in Hong Kong, we built a company that sits at the intersection of the world's leading AI technologies and the businesses that need them most. From day one, our mission has been navigation — helping organizations find the right path through an increasingly complex AI ecosystem, and walking that path with them.
story.p3: Today we operate across more than 10 countries, with offices spanning Shenzhen, Taiwan, Malaysia, Vietnam, Japan, Indonesia, and Cambodia. We've delivered over 30 AI projects across hospitality, gaming, government, education, and enterprise — and we're just getting started.

brandCore.title: AI Business Co-Creation.
brandCore.p1: Basicware AI partners with world-class top AI large model (LLM) developers through commercial research and application, to jointly build an AI business co-creation partner that forms an enterprise community with global clients.
brandCore.p2: Relying on the world's latest cutting-edge AI technologies, we regard every client as a fellow entrepreneurial buddy.
brandCore.p3: With agile and intelligent iteration capabilities, we continuously integrate AI technologies into clients' business scenarios, co-create innovative business models, and jointly explore global markets.
brandCore.quoteLabel: Ultimately Fulfilling the Brand Promise of
brandCore.quote: Empowered by AI, Unlimited Global Possibilities

cards.title: The landscape
cards.body: The global business landscape is undergoing a profound transformation driven by AI: cutting-edge technologies keep emerging, market boundaries are constantly broken, and numerous enterprises with clear business visions struggle to bridge the gap between <accent>"technology implementation"</accent> and <accent>"business growth"</accent>.

cards.title: The gap
cards.body: Many enterprises have resources and business insights, yet fall into the dilemma of <accent>"impressive but impractical technologies"</accent> due to the lack of paths to convert AI into sustainable business value. Others aspire to break geographical restrictions and tap into global potential markets, but fail to cope with complex challenges of cross-border operations alone, thus missing growth opportunities.

cards.title: Our answer
cards.body: Basicware AI was founded to break this deadlock. We do not act as aloof technology <accent>"lecturers"</accent> or pursue illusory technical concepts. Instead, we focus on being a <accent>"fellow entrepreneurial buddy"</accent> by our clients' side, join hands with clients to solve AI business implementation problems with an enterprise community mindset, and seize every opportunity in the wave of global business.

ourRole.title: AI Enabler of Enterprise Community
ourRole.subtitle: For Basicware AI, the value of AI has never been one-way technology output, but in-depth symbiosis with clients' businesses. The future of business is never individual combat, but community collaboration featuring resource sharing, risk sharing and growth sharing.

cards.title: Build a Symbiotic Community with Clients via AI
cards.body: We always integrate into the entire business process of clients as a <accent>"partner"</accent> rather than a "supplier". From in-depth analysis of business pain points and exploration of AI application scenarios, to iterative innovation of business models and formulation of global market expansion strategies, we think and act in sync with clients. In this community, there is no one-way giving or taking, only a close bond that <accent>"your business goals are our technical direction; your global layout is our service boundary"</accent>.

cards.title: Agile Iteration, Empowering Businesses Continuously with AI
cards.body: AI technologies evolve rapidly and market demands change constantly. We deeply believe that <accent>"standing still means falling behind"</accent>. Basicware AI always maintains agile and intelligent iteration capabilities, keeps up with global AI technology trends, and quickly converts cutting-edge technologies and innovative thinking into implementable solutions for clients. We help enterprises reshape operation logic, optimize business processes, expand new revenue streams, and continuously inject new momentum into business growth to sustain commercial competitiveness.

cards.title: Rooted in Global Innovation, Open Unlimited Opportunities with Top Vision
cards.body: Embracing the world's latest cutting-edge AI technologies and supported by global technological heritage, we also possess an international service vision and resource integration capabilities. As a member of the enterprise community, we not only help clients break geographical barriers and connect to global resources via AI, but also explore cross-border business models and expand international market channels with clients. We enable every partner to <accent>break through geographical restrictions and reach previously unreachable global business boundaries</accent> with the power of AI.

ourVision.title: Empowered by AI, Unlimited Global Possibilities
ourVision.p1: Basicware AI believes that every enterprise has unlimited business potential, and AI is the key to unlocking this potential. We are not only users of AI technologies, but also co-builders of clients' business future. We not only help clients achieve business growth, but also explore new business boundaries in the AI era together with clients through enterprise community collaboration.
ourVision.p2: In the future, we will continue to take AI as the bond to build a close community with more global clients. With agile technical capabilities and co-creative partner thinking, we will help every partner break through geographical and industry barriers, open their own unlimited possibilities on the global business stage, and jointly write a new business story in the AI era.

values.title: What drives us
values.subtitle: Five principles that shape how we work with every client, in every market.

cards.title: Customer Success
cards.body: All technological innovations and service layouts are centered on clients' business goals and oriented towards measurable business growth, realizing value symbiosis between the brand and clients.

cards.title: Global Tech Pride
cards.body: Based on the world's latest cutting-edge AI technologies, we deliver high-quality and highly reliable AI business solutions to the world, demonstrating the vision and strength of a global technology brand.

cards.title: Global Community
cards.body: Break industry and geographical barriers, connect global clients and resources, and build a business ecosystem featuring resource interconnection, joint business expansion and long-term symbiosis, enabling every member to achieve growth through collaboration.

cards.title: Agile & Clever
cards.body: Keep up with AI technology innovations in a lightweight and efficient manner, quickly transform cutting-edge achievements into implementable application solutions for clients, and continuously inject new vitality into businesses.

cards.title: Client as Buddy (CAB)
cards.body: Abandon the traditional supply-demand partnership, regard every client as an equal entrepreneurial partner, share opportunities and risks, and move forward side by side on the road of global market expansion.

team.title: Meet the team
team.subtitle: The leaders who built Basicware from the ground up — and who stay close to every client engagement.

members.name: Paul Yung
members.title: Chief Executive Officer
members.bio: Paul brings over 25 years of technology leadership to Basicware. As former COO of an Amazon subsidiary, he led the AWS business across Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan from its early days to hundreds of millions in revenue. He founded Basicware to give every business access to the kind of AI infrastructure that was once reserved for the world's largest companies.

members.name: Zane Wang
members.title: Chief Strategy Officer
members.bio: Zane has spent his career at the intersection of investment, strategy, and enterprise development. As former President of Zhongzhi International Investment and advisor to multiple listed companies in China, he brings the commercial judgment and network that helps Basicware's clients move with confidence. He holds an EMBA from both Tsinghua and Peking University.

members.name: Fox Zhang
members.title: Chief Marketing Officer
members.bio: Fox leads Basicware's market presence and growth strategy across Asia-Pacific. With a background spanning securities, investment management, and corporate leadership, he brings a sharp commercial lens to everything the brand communicates. He holds an EMBA from Tsinghua University.

members.name: Vulcan Zhao
members.title: AI Technology Director
members.bio: AI Application & Commercialization Specialist with over 10 years of experience in AI software and hardware development, with expertise in AI, data and software technologies. Skilled in technical integration and product design, capable of delivering AI products rapidly with low cost and high efficiency. Served as an AI mid-platform construction engineer at Huawei, supporting the pre-training of 3+ large models and 7+ AI transformation project scenarios within Huawei.

members.name: Richard Liu
members.title: AI Large Model Specialist
members.bio: AI and Machine Learning Specialist with 14 years of overseas academic and industrial experience, with research focus covering NLP, Reinforcement Learning, large model application and commercialization. Led cross-domain AI projects at leading tech giants including Meituan, Kuaishou and Ant Group, generating over RMB 1 billion in cumulative revenue and boosting DAU to over 10 million. Built and managed a dozens-strong algorithm team from scratch. Published 8 papers in top international conferences (including AAMAS, ICONIP), received 2 Springer PRIMA Best Paper Nominations, and holds 13 granted invention patents.
